description: Vibrant like the crimson red sky during sunset, this pair of sandals from enroute is perfect for the stylish teen. Pared down to the basics, with a minimalist and earthy appeal, this tops our wishlist for the season! Upper Leather upper with leather straps at the forefoot and midfoot Ankle strap looping around the ankle Velcro closure at the ankle loop Lightly padded nubuck footbed Rivet details on the upper Outsole TPU textured outsole an upraised heel Sandal care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
